mapper.update:
update goods
name = #{name},
pic = #{pic},
price = #{price},
content = #{content},
num = #{num},
type_id = #{typeId},
material = #{material},
wrapper = #{wrapper},
exp = #{exp},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select goods.*,IFNULL(saleNum, 0) as saleNum from goods left join (select goods_id,sum(num) as saleNum from `order` group by goods_id ) as o on o.goods_id=goods.id where id = #{id}
